data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "All 4 children (524d, 7522, 2711, 9ed2) are closed with their own completion-verifier signatures, so the epic's child-closure guard is satisfied and every unit was independently certified. The epic-level completion verifier could not run: its decide@then/verify step deterministically emitted un-parseable prose twice ('output could not be parsed even after repair') — a verifier output-format infra failure, not a FAIL verdict (the captured evidence showed AC1..ACn met). Force-closing to work around the parser bug; the change stack (Gerrit 287-290) is LLM-Review+MAX and Verified+MAX.". Session: bbfa1c1d9.
